intro: Cynanchum pestalozzae, also known as Cynanchica pestalozzae, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, contributing to its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
